source: U.S. Census TIGERweb, layer 2 "2020 Census ZIP Code Tabulation Areas" (https://tigerweb.geo.census.gov/arcgis/rest/services/TIGERweb/tigerWMS_Current/MapServer/2/query); GeoJSON in EPSG:4326.
note: Footprint = ANY-county membership in Lee (12071) or Collier (12021), derived from fixtures/swfl-zip-county.json via footprintZips() — the same rule as build-market-areas.mts, including the 33955 Burnt Store straddle. Geometry is mixed Polygon/MultiPolygon; readers must handle both. Deliberately 2020-vintage to match the county crosswalk and centroid fixtures — public/maps/fl_zips.geojson is 2010 and disagrees on real edges.
